---
title: "ScienceBase Chlorophyll Data Harmonization"
format: html
---

### The raw data script that pulled data from ScienceBase is within 01_chl_wrangle.qmd. Since these data were numerous and from multiple special projects, they require lengthy data harmonization. This notebook is specific to ScienceBase data manipulation so that these "massaging" techniques don't over-clutter the chlorophyll data wrangling notebook.


# Three similar data sources containing toxins, qpcr, and chl data
```{r}

```
